description:
About the job
⭐️ About the Role⭐️

We're looking for a Senior Full Stack Software Engineer to join our team building a compliance-focused life insurance CRM platform. You'll be an experienced contributor who can work autonomously to deliver high-quality features end-to-end, while helping insurance advisers serve their clients more effectively and meet their regulatory obligations.

⭐️ What You'll Do ⭐️

You'll take ownership of features from concept to production, working across our Django and Node.js backends and React frontend. You'll partner with product managers and designers to translate business requirements into well-considered technical solutions, managing your own workload with minimal oversight.

Your day-to-day will involve designing and developing full-stack features, writing clean and tested code in Python and TypeScript, and optimising database schemas for MySQL or PostgreSQL. You'll configure and deploy applications using AWS services, Docker and NGINX, while maintaining automated tests to support continuous delivery.

You'll participate in code reviews, investigate production incidents, and contribute to root cause analysis. We value knowledge sharing, so you'll have opportunities to support less experienced team members and contribute actively to sprint planning, stand-ups and retrospectives.

⭐️ What We're Looking For ⭐️

Essential Skills & Experience:
5+ years of professional full stack software development experience
Strong proficiency in Python (Django) and Node.js + TypeScript
Solid experience building responsive UI's with TypeScript, React and CSS frameworks like Tailwind
Deep knowledge of relational databases including schema design and query optimisation
Strong experience with AWS services, Docker and NGINX
Proven track record delivering features end-to-end with minimal supervision
Experience working in fast-paced startup or scale-up environments
Strong communication and stakeholder engagement skills
Effective use of LLM tooling to accelerate work responsibly

Nice to Have:
Bachelor's degree in Software Engineering, Computer Science, IT or related field
Prior experience with CRMs and understanding of CRM data models
Domain experience in fintech, financial services or insurance
Familiarity with testing frameworks (pytest, Jest, Playwright, Cypress)
Experience with CI/CD pipelines and Infrastructure as Code tools
Exposure to LLM prompting techniques and related APIs
AWS certifications or equivalent cloud credentials

⭐️ What Success Looks Like ⭐️

You'll consistently deliver features that meet acceptance criteria with minimal rework, make sound technical decisions that result in reliable systems, and contribute measurably to product goals. You'll manage your workload effectively, participate actively in team ceremonies, and demonstrate progression in your technical skills and domain understanding over time.
